allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lineas=fs.readFileSync\('fase-1-logica/mi-practica/01-variables.js','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\); [7,8].forEach\(n=>{const l=lineas[n-1]; const primerQuote=[...l].find\(c=>c==='\\`'||c===\\"'\\"||c==='\\"'\); console.log\('Linea '+n+' -> primer caracter de comilla:', JSON.stringify\(primerQuote\), '\(codigo '+\(primerQuote?primerQuote.charCodeAt\(0\):'?'\)+'\)'\);}\);")
